name: 不怎么样

name: （在）……以前/以后/前/后
sentence_1: 考试以前，你一定要认真复习。

pinyin_1: zěn yàng xué hǎo hàn yǔ ne？

translation_1: This meeting is very important — you have to attend whether you want to or not.
sentence_2: 药苦，吃也得吃，不吃也得吃。
pinyin_2: yào kǔ， chī yě dé chī， bù chī yě dé chī。
translation_2: The medicine is bitter, but you have to take it whether you want to or not.
sentence_3: 这个作业是必须交的，你做也得做，不做也得做。
pinyin_3: zhè ge zuò yè shì bì xū jiāo de， nǐ zuò yě dé zuò， bụ́ zuò yě dé zuò。
translation_3: This homework must be submitted — you have to do it whether you want to or not.

name: X就是了
sentence_1: 别浪费时间了，有什么想法说就是了。
pinyin_1: bié làng fèi shí jiān le， yǒu shén me xiǎng fǎ shuō jiù shì le。
translation_1: Stop wasting time — just say whatever is on your mind.
pinyin_2: xià cì bié dā ying tā jiù shì le。
translation_2: Just don't agree to it next time.
sentence_3: 不想去就直接说不去就是了，不用想那么多。
pinyin_3: bù xiǎng qù jiù zhí jiē shuō bụ́ qù jiù shì le， bụ́ yòng xiǎng nà me duō。
translation_3: If you don't want to go, just say so directly — no need to overthink it.

name: 还X呢
sentence_1: 还国际公司呢，服务质量这么差。
pinyin_1: hái guó jì gōng sī ne， fú wù zhì liàng zhè me chà。
translation_1: Some international company this is — the service quality is so poor.
sentence_2: 还中文专业的呢，中文说得还不如我。
pinyin_2: hái zhōng wén zhuān yè de ne， zhōng wén shuō dé hái bù rú wǒ。
translation_2: And they're supposedly a Chinese major — their Chinese is even worse than mine.
sentence_3: 还说自己会做饭呢，饭都做坏了。
pinyin_3: hái shuō zì jǐ huì zuò fàn ne， fàn dōu zuò huài le。
translation_3: Claimed they could cook — and then ruined the meal.

name: 你X你的吧
sentence_1: 我不饿，你吃你的吧，不用等我。
pinyin_1: wǒ bụ́ è， nǐ chī nǐ de ba， bụ́ yòng děng wǒ。
translation_1: I'm not hungry — go ahead and eat, no need to wait for me.
sentence_2: 没有什么重要的事，你忙你的吧。
pinyin_2: méi yǒu shén me zhòng yào de shì， nǐ máng nǐ de ba。
translation_2: There's nothing important — you just carry on with what you're doing.
sentence_3: 你看你的书吧，我自己出去走走。
pinyin_3: nǐ kàn nǐ de shū ba， wǒ zì jǐ chū qù zǒu zǒu。
translation_3: You go ahead and read your book — I'll go out for a walk on my own.

name: 让/叫你X你就X
sentence_1: 老师让你多练你就多练，肯定没坏处。
pinyin_1: lǎo shī ràng nǐ duō liàn nǐ jiù duō liàn， kěn dìng méi huài chu。
translation_1: If the teacher tells you to practice more, then just practice more — it can only do you good.
sentence_2: 叫你拿着你就拿着，不用跟我客气。
pinyin_2: jiào nǐ ná zhe nǐ jiù ná zhe， bụ́ yòng gēn wǒ kè qi。
translation_2: If I tell you to take it, just take it — no need to stand on ceremony.
sentence_3: 让你早点睡你就早点睡，对身体好。
pinyin_3: ràng nǐ zǎo diǎn shuì nǐ jiù zǎo diǎn shuì， duì shēn tǐ hǎo。
translation_3: If they're telling you to sleep early, just sleep early — it's good for your health.

name: 说什么/怎么（着）也得X
sentence_1: 他受伤了，我说什么也得去看看他。
pinyin_1: tā shòu shāng le， wǒ shuō shén me yě dé qù kàn kàn tā。
translation_1: He has been injured — I absolutely must go and see him, no matter what.
sentence_2: 快要迟到了，说什么也得走了。
pinyin_2: kuài yào chí dào le， shuō shén me yě dé zǒu le。
translation_2: We are about to be late — we really have to go now, no excuses.
sentence_3: 这么有用的技术，我怎么着也得学。
pinyin_3: zhè me yǒu yòng de jì shù， wǒ zěn me zhe yě dé xué。
translation_3: This technology is so useful; I absolutely must learn it.

name: X就X（点儿）吧
sentence_1: 买就买点儿吧，别买太多。
pinyin_1: mǎi jiù mǎi diǎn ér ba， bié mǎi tài duō。
translation_1: If you are buying, just buy a little — do not buy too much.
sentence_2: 慢就慢点儿吧，安全最重要。
pinyin_2: màn jiù màn diǎn ér ba， ān quán zuì zhòng yào。
translation_2: If it is slow, then let it be slow — safety is most important.
sentence_3: 远就远点儿吧，环境好就值得。
pinyin_3: yuǎn jiù yuǎn diǎn ér ba， huán jìng hǎo jiù zhí de。
translation_3: If it is a bit far, so be it — as long as the environment is nice, it is worth it.

name: X是X
sentence_1: 我们讨论是讨论了，可是大家各有各的想法。
pinyin_1: wǒ men tǎo lùn shì tǎo lùn le， kě shì dà jiā gè yǒu gè de xiǎng fǎ。
translation_1: We did discuss it, but everyone had their own different views.
sentence_2: 留学生活累是累，不过我们学到了很多知识。
pinyin_2: liú xué sheng huó lèi shì lèi， bụ́ guò wǒ men xué dào le hěn duō zhī shi。
translation_2: Life as a student abroad is tiring, sure, but we've learned a great deal.
sentence_3: 这个房间大是大，就是离地铁站太远了。
pinyin_3: zhè ge fáng jiān dà shì dà， jiù shì li dì tiě zhàn tài yuǎn le。
translation_3: This room is big, sure, but it's just too far from the subway station.

name: 形容词/心理动词+死了/厉害
sentence_1: 面试的时候，我心里紧张死了。
pinyin_1: miàn shì de shí hou， wǒ xīn li jǐn zhāng sǐ le。
translation_1: During the interview, I was terribly nervous inside.
sentence_2: 今天走了这么多路，我的脚疼死了。
pinyin_2: jīn tiān zǒu le zhè me duō lù， wǒ de jiǎo téng sǐ le。
translation_2: I've walked so much today — my feet are killing me.
sentence_3: 他头疼得厉害，早早就回家休息了。
pinyin_3: tā tóu téng dé lì hai， zǎo zǎo jiù huí jiā xiū xi le。
translation_3: He had a terrible headache and went home early to rest.

name: 动词+得/不+了
pinyin_1: xíng li tài zhòng le， wǒ ná bù liǎo。
translation_1: The luggage is too heavy — I can't carry it.
sentence_2: 这么多东西，你自己拿得了吗？
pinyin_2: zhè me duō dōng xi， nǐ zì jǐ ná dé le ma？
translation_2: Can you carry all these things by yourself?
sentence_3: 他受伤了，这次旅游去不了了。
pinyin_3: tā shòu shāng le， zhè cì lǚ yóu qù bù liǎo le。
translation_3: He was injured and won't be able to go on this trip.

name: 难道……吗？
sentence_1: 作为学生，难道学习不是最重要的事情吗？
pinyin_1: zuò wéi xué sheng， nán dào xué xí bụ́ shì zuì zhòng yào de shì qing ma？
translation_1: As a student, isn't studying the most important thing?
sentence_2: 工作出了问题，你难道不应该负责吗？
pinyin_2: gōng zuò chū le wèn tí， nǐ nán dào bù yīng gāi fù zé ma？
translation_2: Something went wrong at work — surely you should take responsibility?
sentence_3: 都这么晚了，你难道不累吗？
pinyin_3: dōu zhè me wǎn le， nǐ nán dào bụ́ lèi ma？
translation_3: It's already so late — surely you're tired?

name: 由疑问代词构成的反问句
sentence_1: 这么有名的作家，谁不认识他？
pinyin_1: zhè me yǒu míng de zuò jiā， shuí bụ́ rèn shi tā？
translation_1: Such a famous author — who doesn't know him?
sentence_2: 他去哪儿从来不说，我怎么会知道呢？
pinyin_2: tā qù nǎ ér cóng lái bù shuō， wǒ zěn me huì zhī dào ne？
translation_2: He never says where he's going — how would I know?
sentence_3: 事情这么多，我哪儿有时间出去旅游啊？
pinyin_3: shì qing zhè me duō， wǒ nǎ ér yǒu shí jiān chū qù lǚ yóu a？
translation_3: I have so many things to deal with — where would I find the time to go traveling?

name: 主语+把+宾语+动词（+一/了）+动词
sentence_1: 你再把那件衣服洗一洗。
pinyin_1: nǐ zài bǎ nà jiàn yī fu xǐ yị̀ xǐ。
translation_1: Give that piece of clothing another wash.
sentence_2: 你把窗户擦一擦，我把房间扫一扫。
pinyin_2: nǐ bǎ chuāng hu cā yị̀ cā， wǒ bǎ fáng jiān sǎo yị̀ sǎo。
translation_2: You give the windows a wipe, and I'll give the room a sweep.
sentence_3: 他把钱数了数，又取了一点儿出来。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ qián shù le shù， yòu qǔ le yị̀ diǎn ér chū lái。
translation_3: He counted the money and then took out a little more.

name: 主语+把+宾语+动词+了
pinyin_1: wǒ bǎ yín háng kǎ mì mǎ wàng le。
translation_1: I've forgotten my bank card PIN.
pinyin_2: tā bǎ xīn mǎi de shǒu jī diū le。
translation_2: He lost his newly bought phone.
sentence_3: 她把作业本落在家里了。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ zuò yè běn luò zài jiā lǐ le。
translation_3: She left her homework notebook at home.

name: 主语+把+宾语+动词+动量补语/时量补语
sentence_1: 因为不收拾房间，妈妈把他批评了一顿。
pinyin_1: yīn wèi bù shōu shi fáng jiān， mā ma bǎ tā pī píng le yị́ dùn。
translation_1: Because he didn't tidy his room, Mom gave him a good scolding.
sentence_2: 同学们把课文读了两遍。
pinyin_2: tóng xué men bǎ kè wén dú le liǎng biàn。
translation_2: The students read the text twice.
sentence_3: 他把这个问题认真地考虑了好几天。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ zhè ge wèn tí rèn zhēn dì kǎo lǜ le hǎo jǐ tiān。
translation_3: He thought carefully about this problem for several days.

name: 主语+把+宾语+状语+动词
pinyin_1: nǐ bié bǎ lā jī wǎng dì shàng rēng。
translation_1: Don't throw your trash on the ground.
sentence_2: 请大家把说明书认真读一读。
pinyin_2: qǐng dà jiā bǎ shuō míng shū rèn zhēn dú yị̀ dú。
translation_2: Please everyone read the instructions carefully.
sentence_3: 老师把学生的名字一个一个地写在了黑板上。
pinyin_3: lǎo shī bǎ xué sheng de míng zi yị́ gè yị́ gè dì xiě zài le hēi bǎn shàng。
translation_3: The teacher wrote the students' names on the blackboard one by one.

name: 主语+叫/让+宾语+动词+其他成分
sentence_1: 我的自行车让朋友借去了。
pinyin_1: wǒ de zì xíng chē ràng péng you jiè qù le。
translation_1: My bicycle was borrowed by a friend.
sentence_2: 他的雨伞叫人拿走了，找不到了。
pinyin_2: tā de yǔ sǎn jiào rén ná zǒu le， zhǎo bụ́ dào le。
translation_2: His umbrella was taken by someone and can't be found.
pinyin_3: nà běn shū ràng tā dài huí jiā le。
translation_3: That book was taken home by him.

name: 表爱憎义：主语+表扬/批评+宾语1+动词+宾语2
sentence_1: 老师表扬我取得了好成绩。
pinyin_1: lǎo shī biǎo yáng wǒ qǔ dé le hǎo chéng jì。
translation_1: The teacher praised me for getting good grades.
sentence_2: 警察表扬那个小伙子帮助了别人。
pinyin_2: jǐng chá biǎo yáng nà ge xiǎo huǒ zi bāng zhù le bié ren。
translation_2: The police commended the young man for helping others.
sentence_3: 妈妈总是批评我不收拾房间。
pinyin_3: mā ma zǒng shì pī píng wǒ bù shōu shi fáng jiān。
translation_3: Mom always criticizes me for not tidying my room.

name: 表称谓或认定义：主语+收/选+宾语1+做/当/为+宾语2
pinyin_1: tóng xué men xuǎn wǒ zuò xiǎo zǔ zhǎng。
translation_1: My classmates elected me as group leader.
pinyin_2: dà jiā xiǎng xuǎn tā dāng duì zhǎng。
translation_2: Everyone wants to elect him as team captain.
sentence_3: 张教授同意收我为学生。
pinyin_3: zhāng jiào shòu tóng yị̀ shōu wǒ wèi xué sheng。
translation_3: Professor Zhang agreed to take me on as a student.

name: 表致使：主语+使/让+人称代词+动词短语
sentence_1: 这件事使我改变了对她的印象。
pinyin_1: zhè jiàn shì shǐ wǒ gǎi biàn le duì tā de yìn xiàng。
translation_1: This matter caused me to change my impression of her.
sentence_2: 那些美好的回忆让我永远难忘。
pinyin_2: nà xiē měi hǎo de huí yì ràng wǒ yǒng yuǎn nán wàng。
translation_2: Those wonderful memories are something I will never be able to forget.
sentence_3: 他的话让我感到很不高兴。
pinyin_3: tā de huà ràng wǒ gǎn dào hěn bù gāo xìng。
translation_3: His words made me feel very unhappy.

name: A不如B（+形容词）
sentence_1: 现在堵车，打车不如坐地铁快。
pinyin_1: xiàn zài dǔ chē， dǎ chē bù rú zuò dì tiě kuài。
translation_1: With all this traffic, taking a taxi isn't as fast as taking the subway.
sentence_2: 我觉得玩游戏不如看小说有意思。
pinyin_2: wǒ jué de wán yóu xì bù rú kàn xiǎo shuō yǒu yì si。
translation_2: I think playing games isn't as interesting as reading novels.
sentence_3: 自己做饭不如去餐厅吃方便。
pinyin_3: zì jǐ zuò fàn bù rú qù cān tīng chī fāng biàn。
translation_3: Cooking at home isn't as convenient as eating at a restaurant.

name: 跟……相比
sentence_1: 跟走路相比，骑车快多了。
pinyin_1: gēn zǒu lù xiāng bǐ， qí chē kuài duō le。
translation_1: Compared with walking, riding a bike is much faster.
sentence_2: 跟他相比，我的汉语差远了。
pinyin_2: gēn tā xiāng bǐ， wǒ de hàn yǔ chà yuǎn le。
translation_2: Compared with him, my Chinese is far worse.
sentence_3: 跟去年相比，今年的冬天暖和多了。
pinyin_3: gēn qù nián xiāng bǐ， jīn nián de dōng tiān nuǎn huo duō le。
translation_3: Compared with last year, this winter is much warmer.

name: 用双重否定表示强调
pinyin_1: méi yǒu xué sheng bù xǐ huan fàng jià。
translation_1: There is no student who doesn't like having a holiday.
sentence_2: 这么重要的内容老师不可能没讲过。
pinyin_2: zhè me zhòng yào de nèi róng lǎo shī bù kě néng méi jiǎng guò。
translation_2: There is no way the teacher hasn't covered such important content.
pinyin_3: méi yǒu rén bù xiǎng shēn tǐ jiàn kāng。
translation_3: There is no one who doesn't want to be healthy.

name: 不是……，而是……
sentence_1: 他不是不想帮忙，而是确实没时间。
pinyin_1: tā bụ́ shì bù xiǎng bāng máng， ér shì què shí méi shí jiān。
translation_1: It's not that he doesn't want to help — he genuinely doesn't have the time.
sentence_2: 我不是不爱喝咖啡，而是担心晚上睡不着。
pinyin_2: wǒ bụ́ shì bụ́ ài hē kā fēi， ér shì dān xīn wǎn shang shuì bù zhe。
translation_2: It's not that I don't like coffee — I'm just worried I won't be able to sleep at night.
sentence_3: 她不是生气，而是太累了。
pinyin_3: tā bụ́ shì shēng qì， ér shì tài lèi le。
translation_3: She isn't angry — she's just exhausted.

name: 既……，又/也……
sentence_1: 这个牌子的奶茶既好喝，又健康。
pinyin_1: zhè ge pái zi de nǎi chá jì hǎo hē， yòu jiàn kāng。
translation_1: This brand of milk tea is both delicious and healthy.
sentence_2: 骑车上学既省钱，又能锻炼身体。
pinyin_2: qí chē shàng xué jì shěng qián， yòu néng duàn liàn shēn tǐ。
translation_2: Riding a bike to school is both money-saving and good exercise.
sentence_3: 这家餐厅的菜既好吃，价格又不贵。
pinyin_3: zhè jiā cān tīng de cài jì hǎo chī， jià gé yòu bụ́ guì。
translation_3: The food at this restaurant is both tasty and reasonably priced.

name: 一方面……，另一方面……
sentence_1: 学语言一方面要多听，另一方面要多说。
pinyin_1: xué yǔ yán yị̀ fāng miàn yào duō tīng， lìng yị̀ fāng miàn yào duō shuō。
translation_1: Learning a language requires, on the one hand, lots of listening, and on the other hand, lots of speaking.
sentence_2: 做好工作一方面需要有能力，另一方面需要认真负责。
pinyin_2: zuò hǎo gōng zuò yị̀ fāng miàn xū yào yǒu néng lì， lìng yị̀ fāng miàn xū yào rèn zhēn fù zé。
translation_2: Doing a good job requires ability on one hand and being conscientious on the other.
sentence_3: 出行一方面要注意安全，另一方面也要照顾好自己的身体。
pinyin_3: chū xíng yị̀ fāng miàn yào zhù yị̀ ān quán， lìng yị̀ fāng miàn yě yào zhào gu hǎo zì jǐ de shēn tǐ。
translation_3: When traveling, on the one hand you need to pay attention to safety, and on the other hand you should also take good care of your health.

name: 首先……，其次……
sentence_1: 选择职业，首先要了解自己，其次再考虑收入。
pinyin_1: xuǎn zé zhí yè， shǒu xiān yào liǎo jiě zì jǐ， qí cì zài kǎo lǜ shōu rù。
translation_1: When choosing a career, first understand yourself, then consider income.
sentence_2: 学好汉语首先要多说，其次要多写。
pinyin_2: xué hǎo hàn yǔ shǒu xiān yào duō shuō， qí cì yào duō xiě。
translation_2: To learn Chinese well, you must first speak more, and secondly write more.
sentence_3: 做好这件事，首先要有信心，其次要认真准备。
pinyin_3: zuò hǎo zhè jiàn shì， shǒu xiān yào yǒu xìn xīn， qí cì yào rèn zhēn zhǔn bèi。
translation_3: To do this well, you first need confidence, and secondly you need to prepare carefully.

name: 首先……，然后……
sentence_1: 首先把作业做完，然后再去玩儿。
pinyin_1: shǒu xiān bǎ zuò yè zuò wán， rán hòu zài qù wán ér。
translation_1: First finish your homework, then go play.
sentence_2: 校长首先表示欢迎，然后介绍了学校情况。
pinyin_2: xiào zhǎng shǒu xiān biǎo shì huān yíng， rán hòu jiè shào le xué xiào qíng kuàng。
translation_2: The principal first extended a welcome, then introduced the school's situation.
sentence_3: 考试前，首先把材料准备好，然后再认真复习。
pinyin_3: kǎo shì qián， shǒu xiān bǎ cái liào zhǔn bèi hǎo， rán hòu zài rèn zhēn fù xí。
translation_3: Before an exam, first get your materials ready, then review carefully.

name: ……，于是……
sentence_1: 他没赶上公交车，于是只好打车回家。
pinyin_1: tā méi gǎn shàng gōng jiāo chē， yú shì zhǐ hǎo dǎ chē huí jiā。
translation_1: He missed the bus, so he had no choice but to take a taxi home.
sentence_2: 他累了，于是坐下来休息。
pinyin_2: tā lèi le， yú shì zuò xià lai xiū xi。
translation_2: He was tired, so he sat down to rest.
sentence_3: 外面下起了雨，于是我们留在家里看电影。
pinyin_3: wài miàn xià qǐ le yǔ， yú shì wǒ men liú zài jiā lǐ kàn diàn yǐng。
translation_3: It started raining outside, and so we stayed home and watched a film.

name: ……,甚至……
sentence_1: 我经常去健身房，甚至还请了教练。
pinyin_1: wǒ jīng cháng qù jiàn shēn fáng， shèn zhì hái qǐng le jiào liàn。
translation_1: I go to the gym regularly — I even hired a trainer.
sentence_2: 他高兴极了，甚至跳了起来。
pinyin_2: tā gāo xìng jí le， shèn zhì tiào le qǐ lai。
translation_2: He was overjoyed — he even jumped up.
sentence_3: 他很忙，甚至没时间吃饭。
pinyin_3: tā hěn máng， shèn zhì méi shí jiān chī fàn。
translation_3: He is very busy — he doesn't even have time to eat.

name: 不仅/不光……，还/而且……
sentence_1: 他不仅学习好，而且很愿意帮助别人。
pinyin_1: tā bù jǐn xué xí hǎo， ér qiě hěn yuàn yị̀ bāng zhù bié ren。
translation_1: He not only does well in school but is also very willing to help others.
sentence_2: 他不光会唱歌，还会弹钢琴。
pinyin_2: tā bù guāng huì chàng gē， hái huì tán gāng qín。
translation_2: He not only sings but also plays the piano.
sentence_3: 她不光懂三种语言，还会弹钢琴和画画。
pinyin_3: tā bù guāng dǒng sān zhǒng yǔ yán， hái huì tán gāng qín hé huà huà。
translation_3: She not only knows three languages but can also play piano and paint.

name: ……，并且……
sentence_1: 他考上了大学，并且拿到了奖学金。
pinyin_1: tā kǎo shàng le dà xué， bìng qiě ná dào le jiǎng xué jīn。
translation_1: He got into university and moreover received a scholarship.
sentence_2: 她找到了工作，并且很快就上班了。
pinyin_2: tā zhǎo dào le gōng zuò， bìng qiě hěn kuài jiù shàng bān le。
translation_2: She found a job and moreover quickly started working.
sentence_3: 这位老师讲课非常清楚，并且对学生很耐心。
pinyin_3: zhè wèi lǎo shī jiǎng kè fēi cháng qīng chu， bìng qiě duì xué sheng hěn nài xīn。
translation_3: This teacher explains things very clearly and furthermore is very patient with students.

name: 连……也/都……，……更……
sentence_1: 她连简单的打招呼都说不好，更难说整个对话了。
pinyin_1: tā lián jiǎn dān de dǎ zhāo hu dōu shuō bù hǎo， gèng nán shuō zhěng gè duì huà le。
translation_1: She can't even manage a simple greeting well, let alone an entire conversation.
sentence_2: 受伤以后，他连走路都困难，踢足球更不可能了。
pinyin_2: shòu shāng yǐ hòu， tā lián zǒu lù dōu kùn nan， tī zú qiú gèng bù kě néng le。
translation_2: After getting injured, even walking was difficult for him, let alone playing football.
sentence_3: 他连一百米都跑不了，参加比赛就更不用说了。
pinyin_3: tā lián yị̀ bǎi mǐ dōu pǎo bù liǎo， cān jiā bǐ sài jiù gèng bụ́ yòng shuō le。
translation_3: He can't even run 100 meters, let alone take part in a competition.

name: 不是……，就是……
sentence_1: 他下课后不是练球，就是去图书馆。
pinyin_1: tā xià kè hòu bụ́ shì liàn qiú， jiù shì qù tú shū guǎn。
translation_1: After class he either practices ball or goes to the library.
sentence_2: 周末他不是去游泳，就是在球场打篮球。
pinyin_2: zhōu mò tā bụ́ shì qù yóu yǒng， jiù shì zài qiú chǎng dǎ lán qiú。
translation_2: On weekends he is either swimming or playing basketball on the court.
sentence_3: 她不是在画画儿，就是在听音乐。
pinyin_3: tā bụ́ shì zài huà huà ér， jiù shì zài tīng yīn yuè。
translation_3: She is either drawing or listening to music.

name: 尽管……，但是/可是……
sentence_1: 尽管收入不高，但是我对这份工作很满意。
pinyin_1: jǐn guǎn shōu rù bù gāo， dàn shì wǒ duì zhè fèn gōng zuò hěn mǎn yì。
translation_1: Even though the pay isn't high, I am very satisfied with this job.
sentence_2: 尽管已经很晚了，可是她仍然在学习。
pinyin_2: jǐn guǎn yǐ jīng hěn wǎn le， kě shì tā réng rán zài xué xí。
translation_2: Even though it was already very late, she was still studying.
sentence_3: 尽管天气很冷，但是他每天坚持跑步。
pinyin_3: jǐn guǎn tiān qì hěn lěng， dàn shì tā měi tiān jiān chí pǎo bù。
translation_3: Even though the weather is very cold, he insists on running every day.

name: ……，然而……
pinyin_1: tā xiǎng qù， rán ér méi yǒu shí jiān。
translation_1: He wanted to go; however, he had no time.
sentence_2: 她以为能轻松通过考试，然而成绩却不太好。
pinyin_2: tā yǐ wéi néng qīng sōng tōng guò kǎo shì， rán ér chéng jì què bụ́ tài hǎo。
translation_2: She thought she would pass the exam easily; however, her results were not very good.
sentence_3: 大家都以为他会放弃，然而他坚持了下来。
pinyin_3: dà jiā dōu yǐ wéi tā huì fàng qì， rán ér tā jiān chí le xià lai。
translation_3: Everyone thought he would give up; however, he persevered.

name: ……，不过……
pinyin_1: wǒ xiǎng qù， bụ́ guò míng tiān yǒu shì。
translation_1: I'd like to go, but I have something on tomorrow.
sentence_2: 他只学了三个月中文，不过已经说得不错了。
pinyin_2: tā zhǐ xué le sān gè yuè zhōng wén， bụ́ guò yǐ jīng shuō dé bụ́ cuò le。
translation_2: He has only been studying Chinese for three months, but he can already speak it quite well.
sentence_3: 这道菜味道不错，不过有点儿太咸了。
pinyin_3: zhè dào cài wèi dao bụ́ cuò， bụ́ guò yǒu diǎn ér tài xián le。
translation_3: This dish tastes good, but it's a little too salty.

name: ……X是X，就是/不过……
sentence_1: 这些衣服便宜是便宜，就是感觉质量不太好。
pinyin_1: zhè xiē yī fu pián yi shì pián yi， jiù shì gǎn jué zhì liàng bụ́ tài hǎo。
translation_1: These clothes are cheap, sure, but the quality doesn't feel very good.
sentence_2: 小张这个人聪明是聪明，不过有时候比较懒。
pinyin_2: xiǎo zhāng zhè ge rén cōng ming shì cōng ming， bụ́ guò yǒu shí hou bǐ jiào lǎn。
translation_2: Xiao Zhang is smart, no doubt about it, but he can be quite lazy sometimes.
sentence_3: 这个地方安静是安静，就是离市区太远了。
pinyin_3: zhè ge dì fāng ān jìng shì ān jìng， jiù shì li shì qū tài yuǎn le。
translation_3: This place is quiet, sure, but it's just too far from the urban area.

name: ……，否则……
pinyin_1: duō hē shuǐ， fǒu zé róng yị̀ shēng bìng。
translation_1: Drink more water, otherwise you'll get sick easily.
sentence_2: 课后一定要经常复习，否则很快就会忘记。
pinyin_2: kè hòu yị́ dìng yào jīng cháng fù xí， fǒu zé hěn kuài jiù huì wàng jì。
translation_2: You must review regularly after class, otherwise you will forget quickly.
sentence_3: 出门要带好雨伞，否则下雨了会很麻烦。
pinyin_3: chū mén yào dài hǎo yǔ sǎn， fǒu zé xià yǔ le huì hěn má fan。
translation_3: Take an umbrella when you go out, otherwise it'll be very inconvenient if it rains.

name: 要是……，就……
sentence_1: 你要是想取得成功，就必须坚持到底。
pinyin_1: nǐ yào shi xiǎng qǔ dé chéng gōng， jiù bì xū jiān chí dào dǐ。
translation_1: If you want to succeed, you must persevere to the end.
sentence_2: 要是下雨，我们就在家里玩。
pinyin_2: yào shi xià yǔ， wǒ men jiù zài jiā lǐ wán。
translation_2: If it rains, we'll just play at home.
sentence_3: 要是你有时间，就来我家吃饭吧。
pinyin_3: yào shi nǐ yǒu shí jiān， jiù lái wǒ jiā chī fàn ba。
translation_3: If you have time, come to my place for dinner.

name: 要是……，（就）……，否则……
sentence_1: 要是迟到，就打个电话，否则老师会担心的。
pinyin_1: yào shi chí dào， jiù dǎ gè diàn huà， fǒu zé lǎo shī huì dān xīn de。
translation_1: If you're going to be late, call ahead, otherwise the teacher will worry.
sentence_2: 要是你不常穿，最好就不要买，否则买了也是浪费。
pinyin_2: yào shi nǐ bù cháng chuān， zuì hǎo jiù bụ́ yào mǎi， fǒu zé mǎi le yě shì làng fèi。
translation_2: If you don't wear it often, it's best not to buy it — otherwise buying it would just be a waste.
sentence_3: 要是太贵，就别买，否则会后悔的。
pinyin_3: yào shi tài guì， jiù bié mǎi， fǒu zé huì hòu huǐ de。
translation_3: If it's too expensive, don't buy it, otherwise you'll regret it.

name: 不管……，都/也……
sentence_1: 不管在什么地方，说话、办事都要有礼貌。
pinyin_1: bù guǎn zài shén me dì fāng， shuō huà、 bàn shì dōu yào yǒu lǐ mào。
translation_1: No matter where you are, you should always speak and act politely.
sentence_2: 不管别人怎么说，我也不会改变主意。
pinyin_2: bù guǎn bié ren zěn me shuō， wǒ yě bụ́ huì gǎi biàn zhǔ yi。
translation_2: No matter what others say, I will not change my mind.
sentence_3: 不管多忙，他每天都坚持锻炼半个小时。
pinyin_3: bù guǎn duō máng， tā měi tiān dōu jiān chí duàn liàn bàn gè xiǎo shí。
translation_3: No matter how busy he is, he insists on exercising for half an hour every day.

name: 无论……，都/也……
sentence_1: 无论在多么紧张的情况下，他都表现得非常冷静。
pinyin_1: wú lùn zài duō me jǐn zhāng de qíng kuàng xià， tā dōu biǎo xiàn dé fēi cháng lěng jìng。
translation_1: No matter how stressful the situation, he always remains very calm.
sentence_2: 无论遇到多大的困难，我们也不应该随便放弃。
pinyin_2: wú lùn yù dào duō dà de kùn nan， wǒ men yě bù yīng gāi suí biàn fàng qì。
translation_2: No matter how great the difficulties we face, we should not give up easily.
sentence_3: 无论谁来，都要提前说一声。
pinyin_3: wú lùn shuí lai， dōu yào tí qián shuō yị̀ shēng。
translation_3: Regardless of who comes, they must let someone know in advance.

name: 既然……，就……
sentence_1: 既然你这么喜欢小孩儿，毕业以后就当老师吧。
pinyin_1: jì rán nǐ zhè me xǐ huan xiǎo hái ér， bì yè yǐ hòu jiù dāng lǎo shī ba。
translation_1: Since you like children so much, you should become a teacher after you graduate.
sentence_2: 既然来了，就进屋喝杯茶吧。
pinyin_2: jì rán lái le， jiù jìn wū hē bēi chá ba。
translation_2: Since you're here, come inside and have a cup of tea.
sentence_3: 既然决定了，就不要后悔。
pinyin_3: jì rán jué dìng le， jiù bụ́ yào hòu huǐ。
translation_3: Since you've made your decision, don't regret it.

name: （由于）……，因此……
sentence_1: 由于您没带护照，因此不能办理银行卡。
pinyin_1: yóu yú nín méi dài hù zhào， yīn cǐ bù néng bàn lǐ yín háng kǎ。
translation_1: Because you did not bring your passport, you cannot open a bank account.
sentence_2: 我对京剧很感兴趣，因此报名参加了这次活动。
pinyin_2: wǒ duì jīng jù hěn gǎn xìng qù， yīn cǐ bào míng cān jiā le zhè cì huó dòng。
translation_2: I am very interested in Peking opera, and therefore signed up for this event.
sentence_3: 由于昨晚下了大雪，因此今天的航班都取消了。
pinyin_3: yóu yú zuó wǎn xià le dà xuě， yīn cǐ jīn tiān de háng bān dōu qǔ xiāo le。
translation_3: Due to heavy snowfall last night, all of today's flights have been cancelled.

name: ……，好……
sentence_1: 我每天都给父母打电话，好让他们放心。
pinyin_1: wǒ měi tiān dōu gěi fù mǔ dǎ diàn huà， hǎo ràng tā men fàng xīn。
translation_1: I call my parents every day so that they can stop worrying.
sentence_2: 我们应该多鼓励他，好让他有信心。
pinyin_2: wǒ men yīng gāi duō gǔ lì tā， hǎo ràng tā yǒu xìn xīn。
translation_2: We should encourage him more so that he gains confidence.
sentence_3: 请早点儿告诉我，好让我提前做好准备。
pinyin_3: qǐng zǎo diǎn ér gào su wǒ， hǎo ràng wǒ tí qián zuò hǎo zhǔn bèi。
translation_3: Please let me know early so that I can prepare in advance.

name: 即使……，也……
sentence_1: 你即使干到明天早上，恐怕也干不完。
pinyin_1: nǐ jí shǐ gàn dào míng tiān zǎo shang， kǒng pà yě gàn bù wán。
translation_1: Even if you work through till tomorrow morning, you probably still won't be able to finish.
sentence_2: 即使工作再忙，也要常回家看看父母。
pinyin_2: jí shǐ gōng zuò zài máng， yě yào cháng huí jiā kàn kàn fù mǔ。
translation_2: Even if work is extremely busy, you should still go home often to see your parents.
sentence_3: 即使天气很冷，他也坚持每天跑步。
pinyin_3: jí shǐ tiān qì hěn lěng， tā yě jiān chí měi tiān pǎo bù。
translation_3: Even if the weather is very cold, he still insists on running every day.

name: 就是……，也……
sentence_1: 我今天晚上就是不睡觉，也必须解决这个问题。
pinyin_1: wǒ jīn tiān wǎn shang jiù shì bụ́ shuì jiào， yě bì xū jiě jué zhè ge wèn tí。
translation_1: Even if I don't sleep tonight, I must resolve this problem.
sentence_2: 你就是不同意，我也不会改变自己的决定。
pinyin_2: nǐ jiù shì bù tóng yì， wǒ yě bụ́ huì gǎi biàn zì jǐ de jué dìng。
translation_2: Even if you don't agree, I will not change my decision.
sentence_3: 就是路再远，他也要去见老师。
pinyin_3: jiù shì lù zài yuǎn， tā yě yào qù jiàn lǎo shī。
translation_3: Even if the road is very long, he still wants to go see his teacher.

name: 无标记
pinyin_1: nǐ zháo jí xiān zǒu ba。
translation_1: If you're in a hurry, go ahead and leave first.
pinyin_2: zhàn dé gāo kàn dé yuǎn。
translation_2: The higher you stand, the further you can see.
pinyin_3: tā tóng yị̀ wǒ bù tóng yì。
translation_3: He agrees; I don't.

name: 不……也……
sentence_1: 今晚我不睡觉也要把作业写完。
pinyin_1: jīn wǎn wǒ bụ́ shuì jiào yě yào bǎ zuò yè xiě wán。
translation_1: Even if I don't sleep tonight, I'm going to finish my homework.
pinyin_2: nǐ bù xǐ huan zuò yě dé zuò。
translation_2: Even if you don't like doing it, you still have to do it.
sentence_3: 他不吃饭也要先把这封信写完。
pinyin_3: tā bù chī fàn yě yào xiān bǎ zhè fēng xìn xiě wán。
translation_3: Even without eating, he still wants to finish writing this letter first.

name: 概数表达法3：数词+来+量词
sentence_1: 教室里坐了五十来个学生。
pinyin_1: jiào shì lǐ zuò le wǔ shí lái gè xué sheng。
translation_1: Around fifty students are sitting in the classroom.
sentence_2: 桌子上放着一百来张纸。
pinyin_2: zhuō zi shàng fàng zhe yị̀ bǎi lái zhāng zhǐ。
translation_2: There are about a hundred sheets of paper on the table.
sentence_3: 这条大鱼估计有十来斤重。
pinyin_3: zhè tiáo dà yú gū jì yǒu shí lái jīn zhòng。
translation_3: This big fish is estimated to weigh around ten jin (about 5 kg).

name: 用”大约、左右、前后”表示概数
sentence_1: 客人大约下午两点到公司参观。
pinyin_1: kè rén dà yuē xià wǔ liǎng diǎn dào gōng sī cān guān。
translation_1: The guests will arrive at the company for their visit at around 2 p.m.
sentence_2: 我的中文老师四十岁左右。
pinyin_2: wǒ de zhōng wén lǎo shī sì shí suì zuǒ yòu。
translation_2: My Chinese teacher is around forty years old.
sentence_3: 春节前后，很多商场有打折活动。
pinyin_3: chūn jié qián hòu， hěn duō shāng chǎng yǒu dǎ zhé huó dòng。
translation_3: Around the time of the Spring Festival, many shopping malls hold sales.

name: 小数、分数、百分数、倍数的表示法
sentence_1: 这个数是零点五，也就是二分之一。
pinyin_1: zhè ge shù shi líng diǎn wǔ， yě jiù shì èr fēn zhī yī。
translation_1: This number is 0.5, which is one-half.
sentence_2: 这次考试，他的成绩是去年的两倍。
pinyin_2: zhè cì kǎo shì， tā de chéng jì shì qù nián de liǎng bèi。
translation_2: His score on this exam is twice what it was last year.
sentence_3: 这次有百分之八十的人通过了，其中三分之一是优秀。
pinyin_3: zhè cì yǒu bǎi fēn zhī bā shí de rén tōng guò le， qí zhōng sān fēn zhī yị́ shì yōu xiù。
translation_3: This time eighty percent of the people passed, of whom a third scored excellent.

name: 哎
definition: interjection used to attract attention or to express surprise
pinyin_1: āi， nǐ kàn nà biān！
translation_1: Hey, look over there!
pinyin_2: āi！ nà shì shén me？
translation_2: Oh! What is that?
pinyin_3: āi， kuài lái bāng wǒ！
translation_3: Hey, come help me quickly!

name: 哎呀
pinyin_1: āi yā， wǒ wàng dài qián bāo le！
translation_1: Oh no, I forgot my wallet!
pinyin_2: āi yā， nǐ dǎ dào wǒ le！
translation_2: Ouch, you hit me!
pinyin_3: āi yā， yǐ jīng zhè me wǎn le！
translation_3: Oh no, it's already this late!

name: 唉
definition: interjection expressing agreement or recognition (e.g. yes, it's me!)
pinyin_1: āi， shì wǒ， kuài kāi mén ba。
translation_1: Yes, it's me — please open the door.
pinyin_2: 「 shì nǐ ma？」「 āi， shì wǒ！」
translation_2: 「Is that you?」「Yes, it's me!」
pinyin_3: 「 xiǎo wáng！」「 āi， shén me shì？」
translation_3: "Xiao Wang!" "Yes? What is it?"

name: 唉
pinyin_1: āi， tā zǒu le， zhēn kě xī。
translation_1: Alas, he's gone — what a pity.
pinyin_2: āi， zhè jiàn shì tài nán le。
translation_2: Sigh, this matter is too difficult.
pinyin_3: āi， wǒ yòu kǎo shì bù jí gé。
translation_3: Sigh, I failed the exam again.

name: 爱护
pinyin_1: wǒ men yào ài hù gōng gòng huán jìng。
translation_1: We should take care of the public environment.
pinyin_2: qǐng ài hù zhè lǐ de dòng wù。
translation_2: Please take care of the animals here.
pinyin_3: fù mǔ jiào wǒ men ài hù shū běn。
translation_3: Our parents taught us to take care of our books.

name: 安

translation_2: He's really something — he climbed all the way up that mountain on his own!
sentence_3: 真有她的，在这么吵的地方都能睡着！
pinyin_3: zhēn yǒu tā de， zài zhè me chǎo de dì fāng dōu néng shuì zháo！
translation_3: She's unbelievable — she can actually fall asleep somewhere this noisy!

name: X什么X
sentence_1: 吵什么吵，公共场所禁止大声说话！
pinyin_1: chǎo shén me chǎo， gōng gòng chǎng suǒ jìn zhǐ dà shēng shuō huà！
translation_1: What are you making such a racket for? You're not allowed to be loud in public places!
sentence_2: 玩什么玩，作业还没写完呢！
pinyin_2: wán shén me wán， zuò yè hái méi xiě wán ne！
translation_2: What are you playing for? You haven't even finished your homework yet!
sentence_3: 笑什么笑，这件事情一点儿都不好笑！
pinyin_3: xiào shén me xiào， zhè jiàn shì qing yị̀ diǎn ér dōu bù hǎo xiào！
translation_3: What are you laughing at? There is nothing funny about this at all!

name: 什么X不X（的）
sentence_1: 什么谢不谢的，我们之间不用这么客气。
pinyin_1: shén me xiè bụ́ xiè de， wǒ men zhī jiān bụ́ yòng zhè me kè qi。
translation_1: Don't worry about thanking me — we don't need to be so formal with each other.
sentence_2: 什么麻烦不麻烦的，朋友之间互相帮忙是应该的。
pinyin_2: shén me má fan bù má fan de， péng you zhī jiān hù xiāng bāng máng shì yīng gāi de。
translation_2: Don't talk about it being a bother — friends are supposed to help each other.
sentence_3: 什么钱不钱的，你是我弟弟，帮你是应该的。
pinyin_3: shén me qián bù qián de， nǐ shì wǒ dì di， bāng nǐ shì yīng gāi de。
translation_3: Don't worry about money — you're my younger brother, and helping you is the right thing to do.

name: 不X白不X
sentence_1: 音乐会的门票是客户赠送的，咱们不听白不听。
pinyin_1: yīn yuè huì de mén piào shì kè hù zèng sòng de， zán men bù tīng bái bù tīng。
translation_1: The concert tickets were a gift from a client — if we don't go, we'd be missing out for nothing.
sentence_2: 这件衣服难得打折，不买白不买。
pinyin_2: zhè jiàn yī fu nán dé dǎ zhé， bù mǎi bái bù mǎi。
translation_2: This item rarely goes on sale — it would be a waste not to buy it.
sentence_3: 公司出钱让大家去旅游，不去白不去，你就参加吧。
pinyin_3: gōng sī chū qián ràng dà jiā qù lǚ yóu， bụ́ qù bái bụ́ qù， nǐ jiù cān jiā ba。
translation_3: The company is paying for everyone to travel — it would be a waste not to go, so just join in.

name: X来X去，都是/就是……
sentence_1: 听来听去，都是一些差不多的意见。
pinyin_1: tīng lái tīng qù， dōu shì yị̀ xiē chà bu duō de yì jiàn。
translation_1: No matter how much I listened, it was all more or less the same opinions.
sentence_2: 大家商量来商量去，就是想不出什么好办法。
pinyin_2: dà jiā shāng liang lái shāng liang qù， jiù shì xiǎng bù chū shén me hǎo bàn fǎ。
translation_2: Everyone went back and forth discussing it, but just couldn't come up with a good solution.
sentence_3: 他找来找去，都是那几本旧书，没有什么新的。
pinyin_3: tā zhǎo lái zhǎo qù， dōu shì nà jǐ běn jiù shū， méi yǒu shén me xīn de。
translation_3: No matter how much he searched, it was always the same few old books — nothing new.

name: 动词+什么（就）是什么
sentence_1: 孩子长大了，不像以前，父母说什么就是什么。
pinyin_1: hái zi zhǎng dà le， bụ́ xiàng yǐ qián， fù mǔ shuō shén me jiù shì shén me。
translation_1: Kids grow up — it's not like before when whatever parents said was law.
sentence_2: 他说什么就是什么，从不听别人的。
pinyin_2: tā shuō shén me jiù shì shén me， cóng bù tīng bié ren de。
translation_2: Whatever he says goes — he never listens to anyone else.
sentence_3: 他决定什么就是什么，我的意见没人听。
pinyin_3: tā jué dìng shén me jiù shì shén me， wǒ de yì jiàn méi rén tīng。
translation_3: Whatever he decides goes — nobody listens to my opinion.

name: 多项状语
sentence_1: 他为了锻炼身体每天早上在公园里跑步。
pinyin_1: tā wèi le duàn liàn shēn tǐ měi tiān zǎo shang zài gōng yuán lǐ pǎo bù。
translation_1: In order to keep fit, he jogs in the park every morning.
sentence_2: 他为了赶上火车昨天一早在车站附近的咖啡馆里快速吃了早饭。
pinyin_2: tā wèi le gǎn shàng huǒ chē zuó tiān yị̀ zǎo zài chē zhàn fù jìn de kā fēi guǎn lǐ kuài sù chī le zǎo fàn。
translation_2: In order to catch the train, he quickly ate breakfast at a café near the station early yesterday morning.
sentence_3: 她为了备考昨晚在图书馆里安静地看了三个小时的书。
pinyin_3: tā wèi le bèi kǎo zuó wǎn zài tú shū guǎn lǐ ān jìng dì kàn le sān gè xiǎo shí de shū。
translation_3: In order to prepare for the exam, she quietly read for three hours in the library last night.

name: 动词+得/不得
sentence_1: 这个孩子已经六岁了，吃饭的事自己做得。
pinyin_1: zhè ge hái zi yǐ jīng liù suì le， chī fàn de shì zì jǐ zuò dé。
translation_1: This child is already six years old — eating is something he can manage on his own.
sentence_2: 这件事你做不得，会出大问题的。
pinyin_2: zhè jiàn shì nǐ zuò bù dé， huì chū dà wèn tí de。
translation_2: You can't do this — it will cause serious problems.
sentence_3: 写文章这件事急不得，你要多读多想才行。
pinyin_3: xiě wén zhāng zhè jiàn shì jí bù dé， nǐ yào duō dú duō xiǎng cái xíng。
translation_3: Writing an essay is not something you can rush — you need to read more and think more.

name: 形容词/心理动词+得+不得了
sentence_1: 收到大学的录取通知书，她激动得不得了。
pinyin_1: shōu dào dà xué de lù qǔ tōng zhī shū， tā jī dòng dé bù dé le。
translation_1: When she received her university acceptance letter, she was absolutely thrilled.
sentence_2: 听到父亲被送去急诊的消息，她担心得不得了。
pinyin_2: tīng dào fù qīn bèi sòng qù jí zhěn de xiāo xi， tā dān xīn dé bù dé le。
translation_2: When she heard that her father had been rushed to the emergency room, she was desperately worried.
sentence_3: 今天的作业又多又难，他烦得不得了。
pinyin_3: jīn tiān de zuò yè yòu duō yòu nán， tā fán dé bù dé le。
translation_3: Today's homework was both plentiful and difficult, and he was extremely fed up.

name: 趋向补语的引申用法：表示状态意义：动词/形容词+下来/下去/起来/过来/过去
pinyin_1: tiān qì jiàn jiàn lěng xià lai le。
translation_1: The weather is gradually getting colder.
sentence_2: 这部小说越看越有意思，我一直读下去，忘了时间。
pinyin_2: zhè bù xiǎo shuō yuè kàn yuè yǒu yì si， wǒ yị̀ zhí dú xià qù， wàng le shí jiān。
translation_2: The novel got more and more interesting the further I read — I kept reading on and lost track of time.
sentence_3: 天气暖和起来了，大家都出去散步了。
pinyin_3: tiān qì nuǎn huo qǐ lai le， dà jiā dōu chū qù sàn bù le。
translation_3: The weather has warmed up, and everyone has gone out for a walk.

name: 动词/形容词+得+动词短语
sentence_1: 孩子们玩儿得忘了时间，直到天黑才回家。
pinyin_1: hái zi men wán ér dé wàng le shí jiān， zhí dào tiān hēi cái huí jiā。
translation_1: The children played until they lost track of time, not coming home until dark.
sentence_2: 面对自己喜欢的明星，他紧张得说不出话。
pinyin_2: miàn duì zì jǐ xǐ huan de míng xīng， tā jǐn zhāng dé shuō bù chū huà。
translation_2: Standing in front of his favorite celebrity, he was so nervous he couldn't get any words out.
sentence_3: 他高兴得跳了起来，原来他考上了理想的大学。
pinyin_3: tā gāo xìng dé tiào le qǐ lai， yuán lái tā kǎo shàng le lǐ xiǎng de dà xué。
translation_3: He was so happy he jumped up — it turned out he had been accepted to his dream university.

name: 动词/形容词+得+主谓短语
sentence_1: 他跑得全身是汗，终于按时到了公司。
pinyin_1: tā pǎo dé quán shēn shì hàn， zhōng yú àn shí dào le gōng sī。
translation_1: He ran so hard that he was covered in sweat, but finally made it to the office on time.
sentence_2: 天气热得大家都不想出门。
pinyin_2: tiān qì rè dé dà jiā dōu bù xiǎng chū mén。
translation_2: It was so hot that nobody wanted to go outside.
sentence_3: 她激动得眼泪不停地流。
pinyin_3: tā jī dòng dé yǎn lèi bù tíng dì liú。
translation_3: She was so moved that tears kept streaming down her face.

name: 动词/形容词+得+固定短语
sentence_1: 快上课了，他跑得上气不接下气。
pinyin_1: kuài shàng kè le， tā pǎo dé shàng qì bù jiē xià qì。
translation_1: Class was about to start, and he had run so fast he was completely out of breath.
sentence_2: 为了准备年夜饭，她累得满头大汗。
pinyin_2: wèi le zhǔn bèi nián yè fàn， tā lèi dé mǎn tóu dà hán。
translation_2: Preparing the New Year's Eve dinner, she worked herself into a sweat.
sentence_3: 他听到这个好消息，高兴得又唱又跳。
pinyin_3: tā tīng dào zhè ge hǎo xiāo xi， gāo xìng dé yòu chàng yòu tiào。
translation_3: He heard the good news and was so happy he sang and danced.

name: 表示存在、具有：主语+有+着+宾语
sentence_1: 尽管是兄弟，但是他们心里有着很深的矛盾。
pinyin_1: jǐn guǎn shì xiōng dì， dàn shì tā men xīn li yǒu zhe hěn shēn de máo dùn。
translation_1: Even though they are brothers, there is a deep-seated conflict between them.
sentence_2: 两国之间有着长期友好的关系。
pinyin_2: liǎng guó zhī jiān yǒu zhe cháng qī yǒu hǎo de guān xi。
translation_2: The two countries share a long-standing friendly relationship.
sentence_3: 她对音乐有着很强烈的热情。
pinyin_3: tā duì yīn yuè yǒu zhe hěn qiáng liè de rè qíng。
translation_3: She has a deep and lasting passion for music.

name: 表示附着：主语+动词+有+宾语
sentence_1: 门关着，墙上挂有“暂停营业”的牌子。
pinyin_1: mén guān zhe， qiáng shàng guà yǒu “ zàn tíng yíng yè ” de pái zi。
translation_1: The door was closed, and a sign reading 'Temporarily Closed' was hanging on the wall.
sentence_2: 这本书的第一页写有作者的名字。
pinyin_2: zhè běn shū de dì yị́ yè xiě yǒu zuò zhě de míng zi。
translation_2: The author's name is written on the first page of this book.
sentence_3: 教室门口贴有今天的课程安排。
pinyin_3: jiào shì mén kǒu tiē yǒu jīn tiān de kè chéng ān pái。
translation_3: Today's class schedule is posted at the classroom entrance.

name: 主语+把+宾语+一+动词
sentence_1: 孩子把书包一扔，坐在地上哭了起来。
pinyin_1: hái zi bǎ shū bāo yị̀ rēng， zuò zài dì shàng kū le qǐ lai。
translation_1: The child flung down his schoolbag and sat on the ground crying.
sentence_2: 经理把任务一说，员工们就开始干活了。
pinyin_2: jīng lǐ bǎ rèn wu yị̀ shuō， yuán gōng men jiù kāi shǐ gàn huó le。
translation_2: The moment the manager announced the task, the employees got straight to work.
sentence_3: 她把门一关，房间里立刻安静下来。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ mén yị̀ guān， fáng jiān lǐ lì kè ān jìng xià lai。
translation_3: The moment she shut the door, the room instantly fell quiet.

name: 主语+把+宾语1+动词+宾语2
sentence_1: 他把时间都花在看书上了。
pinyin_1: tā bǎ shí jiān dōu huā zài kàn shū shàng le。
translation_1: He spent all his time reading.
sentence_2: 我把父母给的生活费借给朋友了。
pinyin_2: wǒ bǎ fù mǔ gěi de shēng huó fèi jiè gěi péng you le。
translation_2: I lent the living expenses my parents gave me to a friend.
sentence_3: 她把奖金全捐给学校了。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ jiǎng jīn quán juān gěi xué xiào le。
translation_3: She donated all her bonus money to the school.

name: 前后两个动词性词语具有因果、转折、条件关系
sentence_1: 他努力学习，终于考上了大学。
pinyin_1: tā nǔ lì xué xí， zhōng yú kǎo shàng le dà xué。
translation_1: He studied hard and finally got into university.
sentence_2: 王经理去开会忘了带资料。
pinyin_2: wáng jīng lǐ qù kāi huì wàng le dài zī liào。
translation_2: Manager Wang went to the meeting but forgot to bring the materials.
sentence_3: 你努力工作，就会有好结果。
pinyin_3: nǐ nǔ lì gōng zuò， jiù huì yǒu hǎo jié guǒ。
translation_3: If you work hard, you will get good results.

name: A+形容词+B+数量补语
pinyin_1: tā gāo wǒ bàn gè tóu。
translation_1: He is half a head taller than me.
pinyin_2: jiě jie zhòng wǒ liǎng gōng jīn。
translation_2: My older sister weighs two kilos more than me.
pinyin_3: gē ge zǎo wǒ liǎng nián shàng xué。
translation_3: My older brother started school two years before me.

name: 主语+被/叫/让+宾语+给+动词+其他成分
sentence_1: 我新买的衣服被他给洗坏了。
pinyin_1: wǒ xīn mǎi de yī fu bèi tā gěi xǐ huài le。
translation_1: My newly bought clothes were ruined in the wash by him.
sentence_2: 她的帽子叫风给吹跑了。
pinyin_2: tā de mào zi jiào fēng gěi chuī pǎo le。
translation_2: Her hat was blown away by the wind.
sentence_3: 对不起，这些资料让我给搞乱了。
pinyin_3: duì bu qǐ， zhè xiē zī liào ràng wǒ gěi gǎo luàn le。
translation_3: I'm sorry — these documents were messed up by me.

name: ……，便……
sentence_1: 领导还没讲完，他便提前离开了。
pinyin_1: lǐng dǎo hái méi jiǎng wán， tā biàn tí qián lí kāi le。
translation_1: Before the leader had even finished speaking, he had already left early.
sentence_2: 他看我心情不好，便陪我聊了半天。
pinyin_2: tā kàn wǒ xīn qíng bù hǎo， biàn péi wǒ liáo le bàn tiān。
translation_2: Seeing that I was in a low mood, he sat with me and chatted for a long while.
sentence_3: 我写完作业便和朋友一起出去玩儿了。
pinyin_3: wǒ xiě wán zuò yè biàn hé péng you yị̀ qǐ chū qù wán ér le。
translation_3: Once I finished my homework, I went out to play with friends.

name: 或是……，或是……
sentence_1: 晚餐我或是吃面条儿，或是吃饺子。
pinyin_1: wǎn cān wǒ huò shì chī miàn tiáo ér， huò shì chī jiǎo zi。
translation_1: For dinner I'll either have noodles or dumplings.
sentence_2: 假期他或是去海边度假，或是去爬山。
pinyin_2: jià qī tā huò shì qù hǎi biān dù jià， huò shì qù pá shān。
translation_2: On holidays he either goes to the seaside or goes hiking in the mountains.
sentence_3: 周末我或是在家看书，或是去朋友家聊天。
pinyin_3: zhōu mò wǒ huò shì zài jiā kàn shū， huò shì qù péng you jiā liáo tiān。
translation_3: On weekends I either stay home and read or go to a friend's place to chat.

name: 一旦……，就……
sentence_1: 一旦养成坏习惯，就很难改变。
pinyin_1: yị́ dàn yǎng chéng huài xí guàn， jiù hěn nán gǎi biàn。
translation_1: Once a bad habit is formed, it is very hard to change.
sentence_2: 孩子一旦发烧，就赶快送去医院。
pinyin_2: hái zi yị́ dàn fā shāo， jiù gǎn kuài sòng qù yị́ yuàn。
translation_2: The moment the child develops a fever, take him to the hospital right away.
sentence_3: 这件事一旦决定，就不能轻易改变。
pinyin_3: zhè jiàn shì yị́ dàn jué dìng， jiù bù néng qīng yị̀ gǎi biàn。
translation_3: Once this matter is decided, it cannot be changed lightly.

name: 假如……，（就）……
sentence_1: 假如他们也同意，我们就按照计划开展工作。
pinyin_1: jiǎ rú tā men yě tóng yì， wǒ men jiù àn zhào jì huà kāi zhǎn gōng zuò。
translation_1: If they agree as well, we will proceed with the work according to plan.
sentence_2: 假如有一天你当了校长，你会制定什么规则？
pinyin_2: jiǎ rú yǒu yị̀ tiān nǐ dāng le xiào zhǎng， nǐ huì zhì dìng shén me guī zé？
translation_2: If you were to become principal one day, what rules would you put in place?
sentence_3: 假如明天下雨，运动会就推迟举行。
pinyin_3: jiǎ rú míng tiān xià yǔ， yùn dòng huì jiù tuī chí jǔ xíng。
translation_3: If it rains tomorrow, the sports meet will be postponed.

name: 万一……，（就）……
sentence_1: 万一他不配合，我们就要想其他办法。
pinyin_1: wàn yị̀ tā bụ́ pèi hé， wǒ men jiù yào xiǎng qí tā bàn fǎ。
translation_1: In case he doesn't cooperate, we'll need to think of other approaches.
sentence_2: 万一没通过考试，你打算怎么办？
pinyin_2: wàn yị̀ méi tōng guò kǎo shì， nǐ dǎ suàn zěn me bàn？
translation_2: What if you don't pass the exam — what do you plan to do?
sentence_3: 出门带把伞吧，万一下雨了就麻烦了。
pinyin_3: chū mén dài bǎ sǎn ba， wàn yị́ xià yǔ le jiù má fan le。
translation_3: Take an umbrella when you go out — it would be a hassle if it started raining.

name: ……，要不然/不然……
sentence_1: 你得道个歉，要不然她不会原谅你。
pinyin_1: nǐ dé dào gè qiàn， yào bu rán tā bụ́ huì yuán liàng nǐ。
translation_1: You need to apologize, otherwise she won't forgive you.
sentence_2: 还好我反应快，不然孩子就摔倒了。
pinyin_2: hái hǎo wǒ fǎn yìng kuài， bù rán hái zi jiù shuāi dǎo le。
translation_2: Good thing I reacted quickly, otherwise the child would have fallen.
sentence_3: 你快点儿走吧，要不然就赶不上公共汽车了。
pinyin_3: nǐ kuài diǎn ér zǒu ba， yào bu rán jiù gǎn bụ́ shàng gōng gòng qì chē le。
translation_3: You'd better hurry up, otherwise you'll miss the bus.

name: ……，因而……
sentence_1: 她上课坚持认真听讲，因而成绩始终非常优秀。
pinyin_1: tā shàng kè jiān chí rèn zhēn tīng jiǎng， yīn ér chéng jì shǐ zhōng fēi cháng yōu xiù。
translation_1: She consistently pays close attention in class, and as a result her grades have always been excellent.
sentence_2: 我和他认识很多年了，因而很了解他的性格。
pinyin_2: wǒ hé tā rèn shi hěn duō nián le， yīn ér hěn liǎo jiě tā de xìng gé。

sentence_2: 这件事太麻烦了，你就帮我办一下得了。
pinyin_2: zhè jiàn shì tài má fan le， nǐ jiù bāng wǒ bàn yị́ xià dé le。
translation_2: This is too much trouble — just take care of it for me and be done with it.
sentence_3: 嫌麻烦就直接买一个新的得了。
pinyin_3: xián má fan jiù zhí jiē mǎi yị́ gè xīn de dé le。
translation_3: If it's too much trouble, just go buy a new one and be done with it.

name: A一+量词，B一+量词
sentence_1: 你一句、我一句，两个人说了很久的话。
pinyin_1: nǐ yị́ jù、 wǒ yị́ jù， liǎng gè rén shuō le hěn jiǔ de huà。
translation_1: Back and forth, the two talked for a long time.
sentence_2: 搬家时大家你一箱，我一箱，很快就把东西都运上楼了。
pinyin_2: bān jiā shí dà jiā nǐ yị̀ xiāng， wǒ yị̀ xiāng， hěn kuài jiù bǎ dōng xi dōu yùn shàng lóu le。
translation_2: When moving, everyone pitched in — one box after another — and they quickly got everything carried upstairs.
sentence_3: 他们你一碗，我一碗，一起把汤喝完了。
pinyin_3: tā men nǐ yị̀ wǎn， wǒ yị̀ wǎn， yị̀ qǐ bǎ tāng hē wán le。
translation_3: They took turns, one bowl each, and finished the soup together.

name: 东一A，西一A
sentence_1: 房间里的衣服东一件，西一件，扔得哪儿都是。
pinyin_1: fáng jiān lǐ de yī fu dōng yị́ jiàn， xī yị́ jiàn， rēng dé nǎ ér dōu shì。
translation_1: Clothes were scattered all over the room — one here, one there, tossed everywhere.
sentence_2: 最近他东一本，西一本地看了不少书。
pinyin_2: zuì jìn tā dōng yị̀ běn， xī yị̀ běn dì kàn le bù shǎo shū。
translation_2: Lately he has read quite a few books, picking up one here and another there.
sentence_3: 桌子上的文件东一堆，西一堆，乱得没法找东西。
pinyin_3: zhuō zi shàng de wén jiàn dōng yị̀ duī， xī yị̀ duī， luàn dé méi fǎ zhǎo dōng xi。
translation_3: The documents on the desk were piled up here and there — so disorganized it was impossible to find anything.

name: 到……为止
sentence_1: 到目前为止，双方已经达成了初步的合作。
pinyin_1: dào mù qián wéi zhǐ， shuāng fāng yǐ jīng dá chéng le chū bù de hé zuò。
translation_1: As of now, the two parties have reached a preliminary agreement on cooperation.
sentence_2: 他把产品设计改了很多遍，一直到客户满意为止。
pinyin_2: tā bǎ chǎn pǐn shè jì gǎi le hěn duō biàn， yị̀ zhí dào kè hù mǎn yị̀ wéi zhǐ。
translation_2: He revised the product design many times, continuing until the client was satisfied.
sentence_3: 这个项目到上个月底为止已经完成了一半。
pinyin_3: zhè ge xiàng mù dào shàng gè yuè dǐ wéi zhǐ yǐ jīng wán chéng le yị́ bàn。
translation_3: By the end of last month, half of the project had been completed.

name: X到Y头上来了
sentence_1: 你竟然说谎说到我头上来了！
pinyin_1: nǐ jìng rán shuō huǎng shuō dào wǒ tóu shàng lai le！
translation_1: You actually had the nerve to lie to me!
sentence_2: 问题不是我造成的，怎么怪到我头上来了？
pinyin_2: wèn tí bụ́ shì wǒ zào chéng de， zěn me guài dào wǒ tóu shàng lai le？
translation_2: I didn't cause this problem — how did the blame end up on me?
sentence_3: 他居然骗到老师头上来了，这太不像话了。
pinyin_3: tā jū rán piàn dào lǎo shī tóu shàng lai le， zhè tài bụ́ xiàng huà le。
translation_3: He actually had the nerve to cheat the teacher — that's completely unacceptable.

name: 不X不……，一X……
sentence_1: 不学不知道，一学才知道汉字如此有魅力。
pinyin_1: bù xué bù zhī dào， yị̀ xué cái zhī dào hàn zì rú cǐ yǒu mèi lì。
translation_1: You'd never know until you study it — once you start learning, you realize how fascinating Chinese characters are.
sentence_2: 这茶不尝不知道，一尝才知道这么好喝。
pinyin_2: zhè chá bù cháng bù zhī dào， yị̀ cháng cái zhī dào zhè me hǎo hē。
translation_2: You'd never know until you try it — one sip and you realize how delicious it is.
sentence_3: 不去不知道，一去才发现那个地方真的很美。
pinyin_3: bụ́ qù bù zhī dào， yị́ qù cái fā xiàn nà ge dì fāng zhēn de hěn měi。
translation_3: You'd never know until you go — one visit and you discover the place is truly beautiful.

name: 好你个X
sentence_1: 好你个老张，原来是你在背后说我坏话！
pinyin_1: hǎo nǐ gè lǎo zhāng， yuán lái shì nǐ zài bèi hòu shuō wǒ huài huà！
translation_1: So it was you, Old Zhang — you've been badmouthing me behind my back!
sentence_2: 好你个骗子，赶紧把钱还给我，否则我就报警。
pinyin_2: hǎo nǐ gè piàn zi， gǎn jǐn bǎ qián huán gěi wǒ， fǒu zé wǒ jiù bào jǐng。
translation_2: You shameless con artist — give me my money back right now or I'm calling the police.
sentence_3: 好你个小王，偷偷拿了我的东西还不承认！
pinyin_3: hǎo nǐ gè xiǎo wáng， tōu tōu ná le wǒ de dōng xi hái bù chéng rèn！
translation_3: You've got some nerve, Little Wang — you took my things without permission and won't even admit it!

name: 早（也）不X，晚（也）不X
sentence_1: 早不来，晚不来，我正要出门你来了。
pinyin_1: zǎo bù lái， wǎn bù lái， wǒ zhèng yào chū mén nǐ lái le。
translation_1: You didn't come earlier, you didn't come later — you showed up just as I was heading out the door.
sentence_2: 早也不问，晚也不问，我刚睡你就来问了。
pinyin_2: zǎo yě bụ́ wèn， wǎn yě bụ́ wèn， wǒ gāng shuì nǐ jiù lái wèn le。
translation_2: You didn't ask earlier and you didn't ask later — you came to ask the moment I fell asleep.
sentence_3: 早不说，晚不说，等我已经决定了才来告诉我？
pinyin_3: zǎo bù shuō， wǎn bù shuō， děng wǒ yǐ jīng jué dìng le cái lái gào su wǒ？
translation_3: You didn't say anything earlier, you didn't say anything later — you're only telling me now after I've already made up my mind?

name: 看/瞧+把+宾语（施事）+X得
sentence_1: 瞧把他兴奋得，简直像个孩子一样。
pinyin_1: qiáo bǎ tā xīng fèn dé， jiǎn zhí xiàng gè hái zi yị́ yàng。
translation_1: Just look how excited he is — acting like a little kid.
sentence_2: 看把你笑得，腰都直不起来了。
pinyin_2: kàn bǎ nǐ xiào dé， yāo dōu zhí bù qǐ lai le。
translation_2: Look at you laughing — you can barely stand up straight.
pinyin_3: qiáo bǎ tā xià dé， liǎn dōu bái le。
translation_3: Just look how frightened she is — she's gone completely pale.

name: 放着X不Y
sentence_1: 你为什么放着自己的车不开，跑去借别人的车？
pinyin_1: nǐ wèi shén me fàng zhe zì jǐ de chē bù kāi， pǎo qù jiè bié ren de chē？
translation_1: Why would you leave your own car sitting there and go borrow someone else's?
sentence_2: 他放着孩子不管，整天跑出去玩儿。
pinyin_2: tā fàng zhe hái zi bù guǎn， zhěng tiān pǎo chū qù wán ér。
translation_2: He just neglects the child and goes out to have fun all day.
sentence_3: 放着好好的工作不做，你到底在想什么？
pinyin_3: fàng zhe hǎo hǎo de gōng zuò bụ́ zuò， nǐ dào dǐ zài xiǎng shén me？
translation_3: You have a perfectly good job and you're not doing it — what on earth are you thinking?

name: X了就X了，（没）有……
sentence_1: 他已经是大人了，走了就走了，有什么好担心的？
pinyin_1: tā yǐ jīng shì dà ren le， zǒu le jiù zǒu le， yǒu shén me hǎo dān xīn de？
translation_1: He's an adult now — if he's gone, he's gone. What's there to worry about?
sentence_2: 东西丢了就丢了，没有什么好可惜的。
pinyin_2: dōng xi diū le jiù diū le， méi yǒu shén me hǎo kě xī de。
translation_2: If it's lost, it's lost — no use feeling sorry about it.
sentence_3: 说错了就说错了，没什么好难过的，道个歉就行了。
pinyin_3: shuō cuò le jiù shuō cuò le， méi shén me hǎo nán guò de， dào gè qiàn jiù xíng le。
translation_3: If you said the wrong thing, you said the wrong thing — no need to feel bad about it, just apologize.

name: 这/那也不X，那/这也不Y
sentence_1: 这也不好吃，那也不好吃，你干脆饿着吧。
pinyin_1: zhè yě bù hǎo chī， nà yě bù hǎo chī， nǐ gān cuì è zhe ba。
translation_1: This doesn't taste good, that doesn't taste good — you might as well go hungry then.
sentence_2: 这也不满意，那也不满意，你到底什么时候能做出决定？
pinyin_2: zhè yě bù mǎn yì， nà yě bù mǎn yì， nǐ dào dǐ shén me shí hou néng zuò chū jué dìng？
translation_2: Nothing satisfies you — what would it take for you to finally make up your mind?
sentence_3: 这也不想去，那也不想做，你一天到晚想干什么？
pinyin_3: zhè yě bù xiǎng qù， nà yě bù xiǎng zuò， nǐ yị̀ tiān dào wǎn xiǎng gàn shén me？
translation_3: You don't want to go here, you don't want to do that — what exactly do you want to do all day?

name: X归X，Y归Y
sentence_1: 打归打，骂归骂，父母永远是最疼你的人。
pinyin_1: dǎ guī dǎ， mà guī mà， fù mǔ yǒng yuǎn shì zuì téng nǐ de rén。
translation_1: They may scold you or even hit you, but parents will always be the people who love you most.
sentence_2: 计划归计划，行动归行动，二者并不完全一样。
pinyin_2: jì huà guī jì huà， xíng dòng guī xíng dòng， èr zhě bìng bù wán quán yị́ yàng。
translation_2: Plans are plans and actions are actions — the two are not the same thing.
sentence_3: 工作归工作，生活归生活，不能混为一谈。
pinyin_3: gōng zuò guī gōng zuò， shēng huó guī shēng huó， bù néng hùn wéi yị̀ tán。
translation_3: Work is work and life is life — you can't treat them as the same thing.

name: 看你X的/瞧他X的
sentence_1: 看你吓得，我只是开个玩笑。
pinyin_1: kàn nǐ xià dé， wǒ zhǐ shì kāi gè wán xiào。
translation_1: Look how scared you got — I was only joking.
sentence_2: 瞧他得意得，不过是考了个第一名而已。
pinyin_2: qiáo tā dé yị̀ dé， bụ́ guò shì kǎo le gè dì yī míng ér yǐ。
translation_2: Look how smug he is — he only came first in one exam.
sentence_3: 看你哭得，不就是一部电影嘛。
pinyin_3: kàn nǐ kū dé， bụ́ jiù shì yí bụ́ diàn yǐng ma。
translation_3: Look at you crying — it's just a movie.

name: 动词/形容词+透+了
sentence_1: 我恨透了那些不诚信的商家。
pinyin_1: wǒ hèn tòu le nà xiē bù chéng xìn de shāng jiā。
translation_1: I absolutely despise those dishonest merchants.
sentence_2: 大雨把他身上的衣服全都淋透了。
pinyin_2: dà yǔ bǎ tā shēn shàng de yī fu quán dōu lín tòu le。
translation_2: The heavy rain soaked every piece of clothing on him through and through.
sentence_3: 他这个人坏透了，做什么事都不可信。
pinyin_3: tā zhè ge rén huài tòu le， zuò shén me shì dōu bù kě xìn。
translation_3: This person is rotten to the core — nothing he does can be trusted.

name: 主语（非生物体）+把+宾语+动词+其他成分
sentence_1: 阳光把大地染成了红色。
pinyin_1: yáng guāng bǎ dà dì rǎn chéng le hóng sè。
translation_1: The sunlight dyed the earth red.
sentence_2: 音乐声把游客都吸引过去了。
pinyin_2: yīn yuè shēng bǎ yóu kè dōu xī yǐn guò qù le。
translation_2: The music drew all the tourists over.
sentence_3: 一场大火把整座仓库烧光了。
pinyin_3: yị̀ cháng dà huǒ bǎ zhěng zuò cāng kù shāo guāng le。
translation_3: A great fire burned the entire warehouse to the ground.

name: 主语+把+宾语（施事）+动词+其他成分
sentence_1: 他把大家叫过来，讨论解决方案。
pinyin_1: tā bǎ dà jiā jiào guò lái， tǎo lùn jiě jué fāng àn。
translation_1: He called everyone over to discuss a solution.
sentence_2: 导演把演员们组织起来，重新排练了一遍。
pinyin_2: dǎo yǎn bǎ yǎn yuán men zǔ zhī qǐ lai， chóng xīn pái liàn le yị́ biàn。
translation_2: The director organized the actors and had them rehearse the scene again from the top.
sentence_3: 他把工人们组织起来，加班加点完成了任务。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ gōng rén men zǔ zhī qǐ lai， jiā bān jiā diǎn wán chéng le rèn wu。
translation_3: He organized the workers, and they put in overtime to get the job done.

name: 一时……一时……
sentence_1: 最近产品价格不太稳定，一时上升一时下降。
pinyin_1: zuì jìn chǎn pǐn jià gé bụ́ tài wěn dìng， yị̀ shí shàng shēng yị̀ shí xià jiàng。
translation_1: Product prices have been unstable lately — going up one moment and down the next.
sentence_2: 这段时间天气变化快，一时冷一时热。
pinyin_2: zhè duàn shí jiān tiān qì biàn huà kuài， yị̀ shí lěng yị̀ shí rè。
translation_2: The weather has been changing rapidly lately — one moment cold, the next warm.
sentence_3: 她情绪很不稳定，一时哭一时笑，让人担心。
pinyin_3: tā qíng xù hěn bù wěn dìng， yị̀ shí kū yị̀ shí xiào， ràng rén dān xīn。
translation_3: Her mood has been very unstable — one moment crying, the next laughing — it's worrying.

name: 要么……，要么……
sentence_1: 我平常要么点外卖，要么自己做，很少去食堂吃。
pinyin_1: wǒ píng cháng yào me diǎn wài mài， yào me zì jǐ zuò， hěn shǎo qù shí táng chī。
translation_1: I usually either order takeout or cook for myself — I rarely eat in the cafeteria.
sentence_2: 那家饭馆的菜要么太咸，要么太辣，我都不爱吃。
pinyin_2: nà jiā fàn guǎn de cài yào me tài xián， yào me tài là， wǒ dōu bụ́ ài chī。
translation_2: The dishes at that restaurant are either too salty or too spicy — I don't enjoy any of them.
sentence_3: 你要么现在决定，要么放弃这个机会，不能再等了。
pinyin_3: nǐ yào me xiàn zài jué dìng， yào me fàng qì zhè ge jī huì， bù néng zài děng le。
translation_3: Either you decide right now or you give up this opportunity — there's no more waiting.

name: 虽……，但/可/却/也……
sentence_1: 比赛虽未取得胜利，但我们收获了宝贵的经验。
pinyin_1: bǐ sài suī wèi qǔ dé shèng lì， dàn wǒ men shōu huò le bǎo guì de jīng yàn。
translation_1: Although we didn't win the competition, we gained invaluable experience.
sentence_2: 这道题虽有难度，可做出来的同学不在少数。
pinyin_2: zhè dào tí suī yǒu nán dù， kě zuò chū lái de tóng xué bụ́ zài shǎo shù。
translation_2: Although the problem is challenging, quite a few students have managed to solve it.
sentence_3: 这道菜虽简单，也需要注意做法才好吃。
pinyin_3: zhè dào cài suī jiǎn dān， yě xū yào zhù yì zuò fǎ cái hǎo chī。
translation_3: Although this dish is simple, you still need to pay attention to the technique for it to taste good.

name: 凡是……，都……
sentence_1: 凡是有机会，他都去争取。
pinyin_1: fán shì yǒu jī huì， tā dōu qù zhēng qǔ。
translation_1: Whenever an opportunity arises, he goes after it.
sentence_2: 凡是错误的行为，我们都应该纠正。
pinyin_2: fán shì cuò wù de xíng wéi， wǒ men dōu yīng gāi jiū zhèng。
translation_2: Any behavior that is wrong should be corrected.
sentence_3: 凡是来过这里的人，都说这里的风景很美。
pinyin_3: fán shì lái guò zhè lǐ de rén， dōu shuō zhè lǐ de fēng jǐng hěn měi。
translation_3: Everyone who has ever been here says the scenery here is beautiful.

name: 除非……，才……
sentence_1: 除非你亲自邀请，他才有可能同意参加。
pinyin_1: chú fēi nǐ qīn zì yāo qǐng， tā cái yǒu kě néng tóng yị̀ cān jiā。
translation_1: Only if you invite him in person is there any chance he will agree to come.
sentence_2: 除非是紧急情况，我才会向他求助。
pinyin_2: chú fēi shì jǐn jí qíng kuàng， wǒ cái huì xiàng tā qiú zhù。
translation_2: I would only turn to him for help if it were a genuine emergency.
sentence_3: 除非你把理由说清楚，他才会考虑改变计划。
pinyin_3: chú fēi nǐ bǎ lǐ yóu shuō qīng chu， tā cái huì kǎo lǜ gǎi biàn jì huà。
translation_3: Only if you explain your reasons clearly will he consider changing the plan.

name: 除非……，否则/不然……
sentence_1: 除非他承认错误并向我道歉，否则我不会原谅他。
pinyin_1: chú fēi tā chéng rèn cuò wù bìng xiàng wǒ dào qiàn， fǒu zé wǒ bụ́ huì yuán liàng tā。
translation_1: Unless he admits his mistake and apologizes to me, I will not forgive him.
sentence_2: 除非你每天练习，不然很难提高口语。
pinyin_2: chú fēi nǐ měi tiān liàn xí， bù rán hěn nán tí gāo kǒu yǔ。
translation_2: Unless you practice every day, it's hard to improve your spoken Chinese.
sentence_3: 除非提前预约，否则医院不会安排检查。
pinyin_3: chú fēi tí qián yù yuē， fǒu zé yị́ yuàn bụ́ huì ān pái jiǎn chá。
translation_3: Unless you make an appointment in advance, the hospital will not schedule an examination.

name: 就算……，也……
sentence_1: 就算再累，我也要坚持完成任务。
pinyin_1: jiù suàn zài lèi， wǒ yě yào jiān chí wán chéng rèn wu。
translation_1: No matter how tired I am, I will keep going until the task is done.
sentence_2: 就算他做错了，你也要注意教育方法。
pinyin_2: jiù suàn tā zuò cuò le， nǐ yě yào zhù yì jiào yù fāng fǎ。
translation_2: Even if he did something wrong, you still need to be mindful of how you handle it.
sentence_3: 就算没有人支持，她也会坚持自己的决定。
pinyin_3: jiù suàn méi yǒu rén zhī chí， tā yě huì jiān chí zì jǐ de jué dìng。
translation_3: Even if no one supports her, she will still stand by her decision.

name: ……，以便……
sentence_1: 请留下您的联系方式，以便日后联系。
pinyin_1: qǐng liú xià nín de lián xì fāng shì， yǐ biàn rì hòu lián xì。
translation_1: Please leave your contact details so that we may reach you in the future.
sentence_2: 他把报告提前发给了与会者，以便大家提前了解情况。
pinyin_2: tā bǎ bào gào tí qián fā gěi le yù huì zhě， yǐ biàn dà jiā tí qián liǎo jiě qíng kuàng。
translation_2: He sent the report to participants in advance so that everyone could familiarize themselves with the situation beforehand.
sentence_3: 他提前做好了准备，以便随时应对突发情况。
